item.title: NFLIreland: Michael McQuaid reposteó Pro Football Ireland @NFLIreland · 24min TONIGHT from 9PM Ireland/UK: @Jeff_Reinebold 's FIFTH
item.description:
Michael McQuaid reposteó Pro Football Ireland @NFLIreland · 24min TONIGHT from 9PM Ireland/UK: @Jeff_Reinebold 's FIFTH ANNUAL PEOPLE'S DRAFT
The picks are in, Jeff has no idea yet - we will see you tonight!
Thanks so much to 32 fans for amazing picks and for the 150+ who applied to be on!
Watch LIVE on X, podcast drops Monday 6AM NFL UK & Ireland y 3 más 3 4 606

item.title: NFLUKIRE: NFL UK & Ireland @NFLUKIRE · 53min Do the @Ravens have the coldest helmet in the NFL? Baltimore Ravens 1 13 3 mil
